retrieved_result: Cyber Security Glossary Advanced Persistent Threat / APT Definition: An advanced persistent threat is deployed by cyber-criminals who have a high level of expertise and important resources to infiltrate a network. They usually use this type of attack to target large organizations seeking to retrieve economic or financial information.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved page discusses cybersecurity terminology and threats, not IDEs or software development tools.
